description: One who enters a space as an honored visitor deserving of hospitality and care. The role of guest is considered a sacred one, bringing the gift of their presence.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'phe' (generative, skillful action, implying a gift) and 'mi' (the inner self). The word's structure suggests 'one who brings a generative gift of the self.' This frames the guest not as a burden, but as someone who brings a valuable presence into the household.
